channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-13158] crash in sanity-sec test_28: NULL pointer dereference
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for S Buisson <sbuisson@ddn.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/e526c5fa-397c-11ea-b1e8-52540065bddc

test_28 failed with the following error:

trevis-37vm1 crashed during sanity-sec test_28

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
sanity-sec test_28 - trevis-37vm1 crashed during sanity-sec test_28
item.summary: crash in sanity-sec test_28: NULL pointer dereference

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: No crashes in this subtest in the past 6 months on any branch.

Console contains:

[20099.305346] BUG: unable to handle kernel NULL pointer dereference at 0000000000000008
[20099.307672] IP: [<ffffffffc0d889ec>] lustre_msg_set_conn_cnt+0xc/0xa0 [ptlrpc]
[20099.309454] PGD 8000000064e2a067 PUD 6770a067 PMD 0 
[20099.311003] Oops: 0000 [#1] SMP 
[20099.311752] Modules linked in: lustre(OE) obdecho(OE) mgc(OE) lov(OE) mdc(OE) osc(OE) lmv(OE) fid(OE) fld(OE) ptlrpc_gss(OE) ptlrpc(OE) obdclass(OE) ksocklnd(OE) lnet(OE) libcfs(OE) nfsd nfs_acl brd loop rpcsec_gss_krb5 auth_rpcgss nfsv4 dns_resolver nfs lockd grace fscache rpcrdma ib_isert iscsi_target_mod ib_iser libiscsi scsi_transport_iscsi ib_srpt target_core_mod crc_t10dif crct10dif_generic ib_srp scsi_transport_srp scsi_tgt ib_ipoib rdma_ucm ib_ucm ib_uverbs ib_umad rdma_cm ib_cm iw_cm ib_core sunrpc iosf_mbi crc32_pclmul ghash_clmulni_intel ppdev aesni_intel lrw gf128mul glue_helper ablk_helper cryptd virtio_balloon joydev pcspkr i2c_piix4 parport_pc parport ip_tables ext4 mbcache jbd2 ata_generic pata_acpi virtio_blk ata_piix libata 8139too crct10dif_pclmul crct10dif_common crc32c_intel
[20099.329541]  serio_raw virtio_pci 8139cp virtio_ring virtio mii floppy [last unloaded: libcfs]
[20099.331158] CPU: 0 PID: 5858 Comm: bash Kdump: loaded Tainted: G           OE  ------------   3.10.0-957.27.2.el7.x86_64 #1
[20099.333092] Hardware name: Red Hat KVM, BIOS 0.5.1 01/01/2011
[20099.334108] task: ffff93c40883e180 ti: ffff93c467ca4000 task.ti: ffff93c467ca4000
[20099.335676] RIP: 0010:[<ffffffffc0d889ec>]  [<ffffffffc0d889ec>] lustre_msg_set_conn_cnt+0xc/0xa0 [ptlrpc]
